heading: Omitted
label: 4871 to 4883 Omitted
notes: CodificationThe public service employment programs covered by this chapter and authorized pursuant to the Emergency Employment Act of 1971, , , , which enacted this chapter, are omitted because appropriations were not authorized after . Similar public service employment programs were included in the Comprehensive Employment and Training Act of 1973, , §§ 201–211, , , which was classified to section 841 et seq. of Title 29, Labor, and was repealed by section 184(a)(1) of the Job Training Partnership Act, , , . The Job Training Partnership Act was classified principally to chapter 19 (§ 1501 et seq.) of Title 29 and was repealed by , , effective .Pub. L. 92–5485 Stat. 146Pub.
